summary: The fix mostly targets the intended generated transcript case, but the ignore regex is broader than the approved `reviews/*.codex.json` scope: it also matches nested `*/reviews/*.codex.json` paths. That over-reaches the narrow path-ignore Thomas approved.

findings.title: Ignore regex matches nested reviews directories
findings.claim: `/(^|\/)reviews\/[^/]+\.codex\.json$/` skips any path segment named `reviews`, so a staged file like `docs/reviews/leak.codex.json` would be ignored. The approved fix was limited to root generated transcripts `reviews/*.codex.json`, so this creates an unintended scanner bypass beyond the approved scope.
findings.suggestion: Anchor the ignore to the repo-root path, e.g. `const IGNORE_RE = /^reviews\/[^/]+\.codex\.json$/;`, and add a negative test asserting `isIgnored('docs/reviews/x.codex.json') === false`.
